# FIT Beyond Plus

> A serious gym and training facility in Tullahoma, Tennessee. Premium equipment, expert coaching, group classes, personal training, and 24/7 member access.

FIT Beyond Plus is a 13,500 sq ft training facility at 449 W Lincoln St, Tullahoma, TN. Memberships include access to strength and cardio equipment, group fitness classes (HIIT, TRX, Barre, Yoga, Cardio, Kickboxing, Pilates), and 24/7 member entry. Personal training is available.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the gym, what we offer, and how to get started.
- [About](/about): Our story, philosophy, and the people behind FIT Beyond Plus.
- [Memberships](/memberships): Plans, pricing, and what's included.
- [Personal Training](/personal-training): 1:1 coaching options and trainers.
- [Classes](/classes): Group fitness class lineup — HIIT, TRX, Barre, Yoga, Cardio, Kickboxing, Pilates.
- [Class Schedule](/classes/schedule): Weekly class times.
- [Combat Sports](/combat-sports): Kickboxing and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu programs for kids and adults.
- [Kickboxing](/combat-sports/kickboxing): Kickboxing classes in Tullahoma, TN.
- [Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu](/combat-sports/bjj): BJJ classes in Tullahoma, TN.
- [Facility](/facility): Equipment, layout, and amenities.
- [Blog](/blog): Training tips, gym news, and updates.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, hours, and tour booking.
